dsl_rule.translation_notes: Strategy uses previous close-to-open returns (prev_close to open) to determine position direction and weights. Returns < 0 signals long entry (reversion expectation), returns > 0 signals short entry. All positions are intraday (hold_days_max=1) and closed at end of day. The 'returns' indicator represents the close-to-open gap. Position sizing (weights) is linear and parameter-free per source, but exact weighting formula is not specified in source text; backtest engine should apply proportional sizing based on magnitude of returns. Dollar neutrality is maintained by offsetting long and short notional values.

The 'returns' indicator represents the close-to-open gap. Dollar neutrality is maintained by offsetting long and short notional values.

source_rule_text: A linear, parameter-free dollar-neutral long-short strategy that uses previous close-to-open returns to determine position weights for entry at market open, with all positions closed at the end of the day.
